title: AirPods have a repairability score of zero
text:
Your AirPods battery is glued inside a sealed plastic shell with zero screws. Try to open them and you destroy them. iFixit gave every AirPods model a repairability score of 0 out of 10. Officially disposable by design.

After roughly 2 years the battery dies. From the first generation the story has been identical. Glued batteries, sealed housings, components buried under adhesive.

Apple charges $49 per earbud for battery service. They just hand you a replacement pair. That is not a repair. That is a subscription disguised as a product.
